stack: vanilla HTML, CSS, and ES modules
findings: Existing dashboard uses hard-coded hex colors and a gradient brand mark.
No shared spacing, typography, motion, or z-index token system exists.
Navigation controls are inert and the page has no mobile navigation pattern.
The chart normalizes unrelated measures onto one unlabeled axis.
No motion library or component framework is installed.
decision: Preserve the original stylesheet as history and wire a token-driven operational console through src/console.css.
